name: Rocket.new
description: Rocket.new — AI-powered web app builder that generates full-stack projects from natural language specifications.

seo.title: Rocket.new — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Rocket.new: Rocket.new — AI-powered web app builder that generates full-stack projects from natural language specifications.

when_to_use: Deploying conversational AI for sales and support automation
Building chatbots that qualify leads and book meetings
Running AI-powered live chat support on B2B product websites
Automating customer conversations across web and messaging channels

cons: Hard to maintain complex apps produced this way
review.verdict: A fine prototyping toy; serious teams still reach for Next.js templates or Bolt-class tools with better pedigree.
review.not_for: Engineering teams needing maintainable, owned codebases
